attributes.action: For total roblox drama to start updating again.
attributes.additional_details: it has been almost 3 years. Us total roblox drama players are tired! we need updates.
attributes.background: Mojo. He is american, well i think. his tiktok is mojosgames! if he updates total roblox drama then he could get fined for thousands or even more. or even jail or prison! get a lawsuit against it. make a court with him and the person that made that rule. make it so he can update again!
